sections.paragraph: f. i.q. עֶוֶל Job 6:29, 30 Job 6:30 11:14 13:7 . בְּנֵי־עַוְלָה the wicked, 2Sa 3:34, and without בְּנֵי abstr. for concr. עַוְלָה used for wicked persons, Job 24:20 Psa 107:42. With ה parag. עַוְלָתָה Ps. 92:16 , and contr. עֹלָתָה Job 5:16 transp. עַלְוָה (which see); p1. עֹולֹות Psa 58:3 64:7 .
